symptoms.title: Label alignment is off

checks.prompt: Inspect peel-point geometry, label presentation, and label-present sensor timing.
checks.safe_next_action: Observe and measure the presentation handoff before changing peel angle, delay, or servo settings.

checks.prompt: Inspect unwind resistance, dancer travel, web tracking, and feed response.
checks.safe_next_action: Record as-found tension behavior and web tracking before making one bounded adjustment.

checks.prompt: Verify bottle spacing, guide centering, and stability approaching the application point.
checks.safe_next_action: Confirm bottle position and repeatability before adjusting guides or hold-down pressure.

checks.prompt: Verify initial contact and wipe-down remain stable after label presentation.
checks.safe_next_action: Inspect contact and wipe pressure without compensating for an unresolved upstream presentation issue.

escalation_triggers: Alignment remains unstable after one controlled adjustment and verification cycle.
Multiple symptoms appear at the same time.
Mechanical damage, abnormal noise, or unsafe motion is observed.
The issue returns quickly after restoration.

symptoms.title: Label has folds

checks.prompt: Verify label feed speed and presentation timing are matched to product motion.
checks.safe_next_action: Compare with a matched healthy cycle before reducing label speed.

checks.prompt: Verify bottle spacing, alignment, and hold-down stability during application.
checks.safe_next_action: Observe bottle motion through several cycles before adjusting aligner speed or guides.

checks.prompt: Inspect wipe-down contact for uneven pressure or product movement.
checks.safe_next_action: Record as-found contact pressure and make only one bounded change at a time.

escalation_triggers: Folds continue across matched products after controlled speed and stability checks.
The web or label stock is visibly damaged.
The issue worsens rapidly with speed.
Multiple application defects occur together.

symptoms.title: Label has stretch lines

checks.prompt: Inspect unwind brake resistance, dancer movement, and web tension stability.
checks.safe_next_action: Measure and record the as-found web behavior before changing brake or feed settings.

checks.prompt: Inspect feed-roller and servo response for pulling or uneven advance.
checks.safe_next_action: Compare commanded feed with observed label arrival before reducing speed.

checks.prompt: Check whether stretch severity changes with conveyor or label speed.
checks.safe_next_action: Use an approved temporary test speed and restore the original setting after comparison.

escalation_triggers: Web tension cannot be stabilized within the approved operating range.
Feed rollers, brake, or dancer show mechanical damage.
Stretching persists at reduced approved test speed.
Print distortion creates a quality or compliance concern.

symptoms.title: Bubbles on labels

checks.prompt: Verify initial contact, hold-down stability, and wipe-down duration.
checks.safe_next_action: Inspect product contact and pressure before increasing run-on or bottle pressure.

checks.prompt: Verify bottle spacing and alignment remain stable through application.
checks.safe_next_action: Observe bottle movement across repeated cycles before changing guide or aligner settings.

checks.prompt: Inspect whether label presentation is late, skewed, or unstable before contact.
checks.safe_next_action: Resolve a confirmed presentation issue before compensating with more contact pressure.

escalation_triggers: Bubbles persist after contact and stability checks.
Adhesive or container-surface condition is uncertain.
The issue changes with label stock or supplier batch.
Product damage or unsafe pressure would be required to compensate.

symptoms.title: Multiple labels applying

checks.prompt: Inspect label-present or gap detection, sensor position, and detection stability.
checks.safe_next_action: Verify sensor detection and record the as-found position before changing sensitivity.

checks.prompt: Verify product detection and spacing remain consistent before label feed.
checks.safe_next_action: Confirm product spacing over repeated cycles before repositioning sensors.

checks.prompt: Inspect feed-command timing and label arrival for repeated or mistimed advances.
checks.safe_next_action: Compare command and arrival events before changing label spacing or delay.

escalation_triggers: Multiple labels continue after sensor and feed timing checks.
Sensor output is unstable or contradictory.
The feed mechanism advances without an applicable product event.
Repeated adjustments fail to restore controlled operation.
